name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express Commerce City, Colorado — ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with multip...
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating multiple physical locations across the United States, including Colorado. The company specializes in providing fast access to cash and financial services for consumers who need immediate funds or alternative banking solutions. Based on their website navigation and service offerings, ACE has been operating in the emergency cash and alternative finance space for an extended period, with a significant physical retail footprint.

ACE Cash Express offers a diverse range of financial products and services including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payment services, money transfers, tax services, and business services. They advertise online loan options and maintain a store locator system indicating widespread geographic presence. Their marketing emphasizes speed of access to funds, positioning themselves as a solution for consumers facing urgent financial needs. The company also offers cards and Porte services, though specific details on these products are limited in the available website content.

ACE distinguishes itself through its multi-service approach, combining emergency lending with ancillary financial services like check cashing, bill payments, and tax preparation under one roof. This bundled service model allows customers to address multiple financial needs at physical locations. They maintain dedicated customer service lines for general inquiries and online loans, suggesting infrastructure designed to handle volume. The company appears to operate regionally with concentrated store networks, as evidenced by their store locator and location-specific messaging.

A significant limitation is that the specific Denver location pages returned 404 errors, preventing verification of current services, rates, terms, or hours at that particular branch. While the website indicates certain loan types may not be available in all states, concrete APR, fee, and term information is absent from the accessible content. Consumers considering ACE should contact them directly for current rates and terms, as emergency cash lenders in this category typically carry high costs. The company's regulatory compliance and consumer protection practices cannot be fully assessed from the available website data.
address: 4952 E 62nd Ave Unit A4, Commerce City, CO 80022

company_info.headquarters: 4952 E 62nd Ave Unit A4, Commerce City, CO 80022

pros: Multiple service offerings under one roof including emergency loans, check cashing, bill payments, and tax services
Online loan application options available in addition to physical store locations
Same-day or next-day funding advertised for emergency cash needs
Dedicated customer service phone lines for general inquiries and online loan support
Widespread geographic presence with store locator system for convenient access
Title loans available as an alternative collateral-based borrowing option
Money transfer and business services available alongside consumer lending
cons: Specific location pages return 404 errors, preventing verification of current services and terms for individual branches
No APR, fee, or interest rate information disclosed on accessible website pages
Certain loan products explicitly unavailable in some states, creating geographic limitations
Limited transparency on loan terms, repayment schedules, and total cost of borrowing
Emergency cash loans in this category typically carry high costs and short repayment periods, though specific rates not disclosed
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash access for unexpected expenses or emergencies
Borrowers with collateral (vehicle) who can obtain title loans as an alternative to unsecured lending
Customers seeking bundled financial services like check cashing and bill payment at a single location
People without traditional bank accounts who need check cashing and money transfer services
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers facing immediate cash needs who have access to a nearby physical location and prefer in-person service combined with ancillary financial services. The major caveat is that emergency cash loans from companies in this category typically carry high APRs and fees; consumers should contact ACE directly for current rates and terms before borrowing, as this information is not disclosed on their publicly accessible website pages.
services: Physical store locations with customer service

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
